feed.title: GMKim's Inventory
feed.subtitle: Undergraduate Student. Mechanical Engineering. Interested in AI & Robotics.

entry.title: Rotary Pendulum with PPO and Domain Randomization

link.title: Rotary Pendulum with PPO and Domain Randomization

entry.summary: Overview Rotary Pendulum with PPO and Domain Randomization is a personal project. Goal To achieve robust control of a rotary (Furuta) pendulum using PPO and Domain Randomization (DR) in simulation, in preparation for real-world implementation where physical inaccuracies may occur. Description The source code is written in Python language and the modeling of rotary pendulum ...

entry.title: DynaCon
entry.summary: Overview DynaCon was a collaborative project I worked with TaeHyeon Kim, Shyam Sundar Kannan, Vishnunandan L. N. Venkatesh, and supervised by professor Donghan Kim and Byung-Cheol Min. The paper was submitted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2024). Goal To provide mobile robots with contextual awareness and dynamic adaptability du...

entry.title: Mobile Robot Platform with ToF Sensors

link.title: Mobile Robot Platform with ToF Sensors

entry.summary: Overview This was a collaborative project I worked with Seung Jin Yang under the guidance of the Robotics Innovatory lab. It was submitted to AI-ICT Creative Idea Contest hosted by Sungkyunkwan University. - 3rd prize Goal To design a scalable mobile platform hardware that can support additional sensors, algorithms, and hardware for future use. Also, t...

entry.title: Vision-based Track Following Vehicle
entry.summary: Overview This was a collaborative project I worked with Donghyuk Park, Yunseong Jeon, and Hyeonggeun Hong. The project was submitted to Autonomous Driving Capstone Design Contest hosted by Sungkyunkwan University. - 1st prize This contest was linked with the Autonomous Driving Capstone Design (ICE3051-41) course at Sungkyunkwan University, supervised by Professors J...

entry.title: Object Tracker
entry.summary: Overview Object Tracker is a personal project I worked with TaeHyeon Kim. Goal To simultaneously detect various objects and track their location with different distances. Description The source code is written in Python language and the package is built by CMake. This package enables to recognize objects, publish TF topic, and display distances for each recognized...
